Package com.smartuxapi.ai.embedding.impl

Class OpenAiEmbeddingService

java.lang.Object
com.smartuxapi.ai.embedding.impl.OpenAiEmbeddingService
All Implemented Interfaces:
EmbeddingService
public class OpenAiEmbeddingService extends Object implements EmbeddingService
OpenAI Embeddings API 기반 EmbeddingService 구현체.

엔드포인트: POST https://api.openai.com/v1/embeddings. 기본 모델 text-embedding-3-small (1536 차원).

Since:
0.9.0
